g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a user reach an EC2 instance in a public subnet?')
sendPrompt('What does the Internet Gateway do for EC2?')
sendPrompt('What is a bastion host and why is it in a public subnet?')
sendPrompt('How does a load balancer connect to EC2 instances?')
sendPrompt('What are all the parameters I need to launch an EC2 instance?')
sendPrompt('How does the aws_ami data source work?')
sendPrompt('How does an EC2 instance use an IAM role?')
sendPrompt('How do I create a key pair for SSH access to EC2?')
sendPrompt('What is an EBS volume and how does it attach to EC2?')
